import React, { useState } from "react"; import Hero from "../components/Hero"; import TourCard from "../components/TourCard"; import Contact from "../components/Contact"; // ── YOUR TOUR DATA ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // To edit a tour: change values below and save. No database needed. // imageUrl: paste your Cloudinary URL, or use "/images/photo.jpg" for local files // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const TOURS = [ { id: 1, title: "Adi Kailash Yatra", category: "Sacred Circuit", destinations: ["Dharchula", "Gunji", "Adi Kailash", "Om Parvat"], duration: "5 Days / 4 Nights", difficulty: "Moderate", price: 24999, description: 'Embark on a divine pilgrimage to Adi Kailash, the earthly abode of Lord Shiva. Witness the sacred Om Parvat — a natural snow formation of the holy "ॐ" symbol — as you traverse stunning high-altitude valleys and ancient trade routes.', imageUrl: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1605649487212-47bdab064df7?w=800&q=80", highlights: [ "Natural snow ॐ symbol on Om Parvat", "Parvati Sarovar sacred lake at 18,000 ft", ], }, { id: 2, title: "Om Parvat & Darma Valley", category: "Sacred Circuit", destinations: ["Pithoragarh", "Darma Valley", "Om Parvat Base"], duration: "5 Days / 4 Nights", difficulty: "Hard", price: 21999, description: "Combine the mystical Om Parvat darshan with an exploration of the pristine Darma Valley — one of the most secluded valleys in the Kumaon Himalayas, home to ancient Bhotiya villages and rare Himalayan flora.", imageUrl: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1573408301185-9519f94f4f00?w=800&q=80", highlights: [ "Views of Panchachuli peaks", "Cultural interaction with Bhotiya communities", ], }, { id: 3, title: "Darma Valley Cultural Trek", category: "Sacred Circuit", destinations: ["Dharchula", "Sobla", "Thal", "Darma Valley"], duration: "5 Days / 4 Nights", difficulty: "Moderate", price: "Contact Us For Price", description: "A soul-stirring journey through Darma Valley dotted with apple orchards, ancient monasteries, and villages that have preserved centuries-old Tibetan-influenced culture. Opens to panoramic views of the Panchachuli and Chhanguch ranges.", imageUrl: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1464822759023-fed622ff2c3b?w=800&q=80", highlights: [ "Apple orchards and village homestays", "Ancient monasteries and prayer flags", ], }, { id: 4, title: "Munsyari — Himalayan Base Camp", category: "Alpine Adventure", destinations: ["Munsyari", "Thamri Kund", "Khaliya Top"], duration: "7 Days / 6 Nights", difficulty: "Moderate", price: "Contact Us For Price", description: 'Known as the "Little Kashmir of Uttarakhand," Munsyari sits at the base of the magnificent Panchachuli Peaks. Includes a trek to Khaliya Top for 360° Himalayan views and an overnight stay under a blanket of stars.', imageUrl: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1533130061792-64b345e4a833?w=800&q=80", highlights: [ "Sunrise view of Panchachuli Peaks", "Thamri Kund — pristine glacial lake", ], }, { id: 5, title: "Milam Glacier Trek", category: "Alpine Adventure", destinations: [ "Munsyari", "Lilam", "Bugdiyar", "Milam Glacier", "Bankathiya", ], duration: "5 Days / 4 Nights", difficulty: "Hard", price: "Contact Us For Price", description: "One of the most rewarding high-altitude treks in Kumaon, following the ancient trade route to Tibet along the Goriganga river. The Bankathiya campsite offers jaw-dropping views of some of the most remote peaks in India.", imageUrl: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4?w=800&q=80", highlights: [ "Milam Glacier at 13,000+ ft", "Ancient India-Tibet trade route", ], }, { id: 6, title: "Khaliya Top Trek", category: "Alpine Adventure", destinations: ["Munsyari", "Khaliya Top (3500m)"], duration: "5 Days / 4 Nights", difficulty: "Moderate", price: "Contact Us For Price", description: "A short but spectacular trek to Khaliya Top at 3,500m offering a panoramic canvas of Panchachuli, Rajrambha, Nanda Kot, and Trishul peaks. Perfect for first-time trekkers who want maximum views with manageable effort.", imageUrl: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551632811-561732d1e306?w=800&q=80", highlights: [ "360° view of 5 major Himalayan peaks", "Ideal for first-time trekkers", ], }, ]; // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const CATEGORIES = ["All", "Sacred Circuit", "Alpine Adventure"]; const AboutSection = () => (
About Us

Born in the Foothills,
Called to the Peaks

Him Kiran Tour was founded by passionate trekkers from Munsyari who grew up in the shadow of the Himalayas. We specialise exclusively in the Kumaon region — a part of Uttarakhand that remains unspoiled, deeply spiritual, and stunningly beautiful.

Every trek we design is personally scouted by our team. We work with local guides, village homestays, and porters — ensuring your journey is authentic, safe, and directly benefits the mountain communities you visit.

{[ { number: "500+", label: "Treks Completed" }, { number: "8+", label: "Years Experience" }, { number: "100%", label: "Safe Returns" }, ].map((s) => (
{s.number}
{s.label}
))}

Starting from Haldwani

Uttarakhand, India

); const Home = () => { const [activeCategory, setActiveCategory] = useState("All"); const filtered = activeCategory === "All" ? TOURS : TOURS.filter((t) => t.category === activeCategory); const sacred = filtered.filter((t) => t.category === "Sacred Circuit"); const alpine = filtered.filter((t) => t.category === "Alpine Adventure"); return ( <>
Our Packages

Himalayan Trek Packages

All treks depart from Haldwani. Choose your adventure — a sacred pilgrimage circuit or a high-altitude alpine challenge.

{CATEGORIES.map((cat) => ( ))}
{(activeCategory === "All" || activeCategory === "Sacred Circuit") && sacred.length > 0 && (

The Sacred Circuit

Pilgrimages — Adi Kailash · Om Parvat · Darma Valley

{sacred.map((tour) => ( ))}
)} {(activeCategory === "All" || activeCategory === "Alpine Adventure") && alpine.length > 0 && (

The Alpine Adventure

High-altitude treks — Munsyari · Milam Glacier · Khaliya Top

{alpine.map((tour) => ( ))}
)}
); }; export default Home;
